ConnectionStrings._comment: PostgreSQL connection. Overridden by appsettings.Development.json locally and by env vars in production (ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection).

MongoDB._comment: MongoDB connection for read-optimized product data (CQRS read store).

Cors._comment: Whitelisted origins for cross-origin requests. AllowCredentials() is enabled so cookies (BFF) work cross-origin. Never use wildcard '*' with credentials.

Authentik._comment: JWT Bearer auth via Authentik (OIDC provider). Overridden by appsettings.Development.json locally. In production supply via env vars (e.g. Authentik__Authority) or secret manager. ValidateOnStart() fails fast if missing.

Bff._comment: BFF Cookie+OIDC auth for browser SPA clients. Overridden by appsettings.Development.json locally. In production supply via env vars (e.g. Bff__Authority) or secret manager. ValidateOnStart() fails fast if missing.

SystemIdentity._comment: Actor ID used for system-initiated operations (seeders, background jobs) where there is no authenticated user.

Bootstrap._comment: Tenant seeded at startup by AuthBootstrapSeeder. If missing or soft-deleted, it gets created/reactivated automatically.
